decisions.decision: EVERY checklist step must be followed for EVERY agent. No skipping.
Opus 4.6 for bootstrap, gpt-5.4 for normal ops

Voice+dreaming are per-agent OVERLAYS, not in tier templates
decisions.rationale: Templates are shared tier defaults. Overlays customize per agent.
